summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Payment Types Invoicex-style features. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend PaymentTypesPage UI tested successfully with all components (quote table, custom days, simulation, codice FE dropdown) working correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/payment-types/: PASS - Returns list with quote, codice_fe, divisione_automatica, richiedi_giorno_scadenza fields
backend_api.POST /api/payment-types/: PASS - Creates payment type with custom quotes (e.g., [{giorni: 80, quota: 100}])
backend_api.PUT /api/payment-types/{id}: PASS - Updates payment type quotes and options
backend_api.POST /api/payment-types/{id}/simulate: PASS - Calculates deadlines with data_fattura and importo
backend_api.Simulate with fine_mese: PASS - Correctly moves deadline to end of month
backend_api.Backward compatibility: PASS - Legacy gg_30/60/90 flags auto-generate quote list via enrich_response()
backend_api.POST /api/payment-types/seed-defaults: PASS - Creates 11 predefined payment types with quotes

Dialog components.Quote table: PASS - Shows PERIODO, QUOTA columns with auto-distribution
Dialog components.Simulation section: PASS - date, importo inputs and Calcola button
Dialog components.Simulation results: PASS - Shows RATA, SCADENZA, QUOTA, IMPORTO

integration.Create payment type with custom 80-day q: PASS - Created TEST80GG with MP05 codice_fe
integration.Table displays new item: PASS - TEST80GG shows with 80gg scadenze, FM indicator

test_credentials: Created test session for UI testing (cleaned up after tests)
seed_data_creation: None required - tests create and cleanup own data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Types Invoicex-style feature fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Custom quote system with giorni + quota%, 2) codice_fe for electronic invoicing (MP01-MP23), 3) Simulate endpoint calculates deadlines with fine_mese support, 4) Backward compatibility via enrich_response() converts legacy gg_30/60/90 flags to quote arrays. All data-testid attributes properly added for UI automation.
